message: agent1: working on extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (image_to_base64 method). Will touch that file only.

agent1: I've already landed normalize_image_bytes(image_bytes) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) in types.py, and updated image_to_base64 to use it (only field names image/image_mimetype touched, no rename). Since decoded_for_guessing is exactly the bytes filetype.guess() should run on, feel free to build get_image_mimetype() around normalize_image_bytes instead of inline filetype.guess(self.image) - that keeps behavior correct for already-base64 input too. Let me know how you want to merge; happy to adjust if you go first.

agent2: interesting - my working copy doesn't show your normalize_image_bytes changes yet, seems we may be in separate isolated checkouts (each submitting our own patch.txt separately per the task protocol). My get_image_mimetype() is self-contained: it guesses via filetype.guess(self.image) only when image_mimetype is unset, called from image_to_base64 before the base64 encoding step, so behavior matches the original exactly (and post-construction calls just return the cached value, same as before when guess failed). Should be fine independently of your refactor. Good luck!
